name: agent-surface
description: SDK and CLI for serving interactive agent UI artifacts.
author: Vlad Tansky

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:fsevents --external:esbuild --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/mdx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/mdx.js && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:fsevents --external:esbuild --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --outfile=dist/cli.js && mkdir -p dist/templates && cp -R templates/. dist/templates/ && chmod +x dist/cli.js
